---
title: "Resources"
toc: true
---

## Textbooks

All course textbooks are freely available online:

- [R for Data Science (2e)](https://r4ds.hadley.nz/) -- Wickham, Cetinkaya-Rundel & Grolemund
- [Probability!](https://bookdown.org/probability/beta/) -- Dos-Santos Disorbo & Blitzstein
- [Regression and Other Stories](https://avehtari.github.io/ROS-Examples/) -- Gelman, Hill & Vehtari
- [The Effect](https://theeffectbook.net/) -- Huntington-Klein
- [Causal Inference: The Mixtape](https://mixtape.scunning.com/) -- Cunningham

## Getting Started with R

- [Download R](https://cran.r-project.org/)
- [Download RStudio](https://posit.co/download/rstudio-desktop/)
- [RStudio Primers](https://posit.cloud/learn/primers) -- interactive tutorials

## Getting Help

- **Office hours:** [Schedule a meeting](https://calendly.com/app/scheduling/meeting_types/user/me)
- **Email:** [rwhorne@clemson.edu](mailto:rwhorne@clemson.edu) (allow one business day for response)
- **Math refresher:** [Khan Academy](https://www.khanacademy.org/) for algebra and calculus fundamentals
